description: Required HTTP request headers. Every SDK MUST send these on both /v1-evaluate and /v1-verify-permit. The api_key is NEVER placed in the request body.

required_headers.name: Authorization
required_headers.description: The ONLY path for the API key. Body MUST NOT contain an `api_key` field.

required_headers.name: User-Agent
required_headers.description: SDK name and semver. `atlasent-python/1.0.0` or `@atlasent/sdk/1.0.0` both accepted.

required_headers.name: X-Request-ID
required_headers.description: Per-request correlation ID. Hex, UUID v4 recommended. MUST be unique per request.
